let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),

        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω

        apply hsubgrad

        rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]

        linarith
      have h_main : 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        have : 0 < η := hη_pos

    have h_int_step : ∀ t,
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
          η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
      have h2 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤ 
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +

        rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)]

            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +

        _ ≤ (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P -

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
  have h_step : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
      η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h_proc : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • g t ω := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
      simp [g]
    have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = 
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [h_proc]
      rw [norm_sq_sub]
      simp [inner_smul_right, inner_comm, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos hη_pos]
      ring
    have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
      apply hsubgrad
    have h_inner : ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ = -⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
      rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
      ring
    have h_subgrad' : ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
      linarith
    have h_main : 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
      have : 0 < η := hη_pos
      nlinarith
    linarith
  have h_int_step : ∀ t,
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
      η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    intro t
    have h1 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
    have h2 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤ 
        ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono setup.hP
      · exact (h_int_f t).measurable
      · exact (h_int_norm_sq t).sub (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)).add ((h_int_sq t).const_mul (η ^ 2)).measurable
      · exact fun ω => h1 ω
    have h3 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = 
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
      simp [integral_const_sub, h_int_f t, setup.hP]
      ring
    have h4 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P = 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      simp [integral_add, integral_sub, h_int_norm_sq t, h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), h_int_sq t]
    linarith
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
      η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro t ht
    exact h_int_step t
  have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)]
      · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
      · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
      · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
      · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
      · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; ring
    rw [h2]
    have h3 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h4 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
        simp [Finset.Ico]
      rw [h4]
      have h5 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_Ico_succ_top]
        · simp
        · omega
      rw [h5]
      ring
    rw [h3]
  have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t
    have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by intro ω; apply hbounded
    have h2 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro ω
      have : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
      have : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := h1 ω
      nlinarith
    have h3 : ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono setup.hP
      · exact (h_int_sq t).measurable
      · exact measurable_const
      · exact fun ω => h2 ω
    have h4 : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by simp [setup.hP]
    linarith
  have h_main : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
      η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := h_sum
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +

      _ ≤ (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        gcongr
        intro t ht
        exact (h_grad_bound t).mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg η)
      _ = ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]; ring
  have h_final : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
    have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := h_main
    have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
      rw [integral_const setup.hP]
    have h3 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≥ 0 := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      exact fun ω => sq_nonneg _
    have h4 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 = T * G ^ 2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    rw [h2, h4] at h1
    have h5 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) = 
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
      simp [Finset.sum_mul]
    rw [h5] at h1
    have h6 : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * T * G ^ 2 := by linarith
    have h7 : 0 < 2 * η := by linarith
    have h8 : 0 < (T : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hT
    have h9 : 0 < 2 * η * T := by positivity
    have h10 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_proc : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • g t ω := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        simp [g]
      have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = 
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h_proc]
        rw [norm_sq_sub]
        simp [inner_smul_right, inner_comm, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos hη_pos]
        ring
      have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
        apply hsubgrad
      have h_inner : ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ = -⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
        ring
      have h_subgrad' : ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
        linarith
      have h_main : 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        have : 0 < η := hη_pos
        nlinarith
      linarith
    have h_int_step : ∀ t,
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
          η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
      have h2 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤ 
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
          η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.hP
        · exact (h_int_f t).measurable
        · exact (h_int_norm_sq t).sub (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)).add ((h_int_sq t).const_mul (η ^ 2)).measurable
        · exact fun ω => h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = 
          2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        simp [integral_const_sub, h_int_f t, setup.hP]
        ring
      have h4 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
          η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P = 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        simp [integral_add, integral_sub, h_int_norm_sq t, h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), h_int_sq t]
      linarith
    have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_int_step t
    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)]
        · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
        · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
        · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
        · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
        · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; ring
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        have h4 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
          simp [Finset.Ico]
        rw [h4]
        have h5 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_succ_top]
          · simp
          · omega
        rw [h5]
        ring
      rw [h3]
    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by intro ω; apply hbounded
      have h2 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        have : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
        have : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := h1 ω
        nlinarith
      have h3 : ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.hP
        · exact (h_int_sq t).measurable
        · exact measurable_const
        · exact fun ω => h2 ω
      have h4 : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by simp [setup.hP]
      linarith
    have h_main : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
        η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
            η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := h_sum
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by rw [h_telescope]
        _ ≤ (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + 
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
          gcongr
          intro t ht
          exact (h_grad_bound t).mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg η)
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
            η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]; ring
    have h_final : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
          (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
      have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤ 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + 
          η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := h_main
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
        simp [SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
        rw [integral_const setup.hP]

        exact fun ω => sq_nonneg _

      rw [h2, h4] at h1

          2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  rfl

@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  rfl

end SubgradientSetup

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
  have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
    have hG := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
    exact norm_nonneg _
  -- Key lemma: norm expansion for one step
  have h_norm_expand : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
    rw [h_step]
    have : ‖(setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [← sub_sub]
    rw [this]
    rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
    simp [inner_smul_right, smul_smul, mul_assoc, mul_comm (setup.η t), mul_left_comm (setup.η t)]
    ring_nf
    <;> simp [inner_comm]
    <;> ring_nf
  -- Subgradient inequality gives lower bound on inner product
  have h_subgrad_ineq : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥
      f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := hsubgrad (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h₂ : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := h₁
    have h₃ : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ =
        -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
      rw [inner_sub_right, inner_self_sub]
      ring
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    linarith
  -- Bounded gradient squared
  have h_grad_sq_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := hbounded (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ G := by
      have h₄ := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
      exact norm_nonneg _
    nlinarith
  -- Combine norm expansion with subgradient inequality
  have h_combined : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := h_norm_expand t ω
    have h₂ := h_subgrad_ineq t ω
    have h₃ := h_grad_sq_bound t ω
    have h₄ : 0 < setup.η t := by
      rw [hη_const t]
      exact hη_pos
    have h₅ : -2 * setup.η t * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≤
        -2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) := by
      have h₆ : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := h₂
      have h₇ : 0 < 2 * setup.η t := by positivity
      nlinarith
    have h₆ : (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h₇ : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := h₃
      have h₈ : 0 ≤ (setup.η t) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
      nlinarith
    nlinarith
  -- Integrate the combined inequality
  have h_integrated : ∀ (t : ℕ),
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    intro t
    have h₁ : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := h_combined t
    have h₂ : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono_on_univ
      · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      · intro ω
        exact h₁ ω
    have h₃ : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h₄ : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
          (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
          ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P +
          ∫ ω, ((setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_add
        · apply integral_add
          · exact h_int_norm_sq t
          · apply Integrable.const_mul
            apply Integrable.sub
            · exact h_int_f t
            · exact integrable_const _
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      rw [h₄]
      have h₅ : ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P =
          -2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        have h₆ : ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P =
            -2 * setup.η t * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_const_mul
          apply Integrable.sub
          · exact h_int_f t
          · exact integrable_const _
        rw [h₆]
        have h₇ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
          have h₈ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P =
              ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, f wStar ∂setup.P := by
            apply integral_sub
            · exact h_int_f t
            · exact integrable_const _
          rw [h₈]
          have h₉ : ∫ ω, f wStar ∂setup.P = f wStar := by
            rw [integral_const]
            simp [setup.hP]
          rw [h₉]
        rw [h₇]
      rw [h₅]
      have h₆ : ∫ ω, ((setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P = (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        rw [integral_const]
        simp [setup.hP]
      rw [h₆]
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  -- Sum over t from 0 to T-1
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    have h₁ : ∀ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      intro t ht
      have h₂ := h_integrated t
      have h₃ : 0 < setup.η t := by
        rw [hη_const t]
        exact hη_pos
      linarith
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P -
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by

        exact h₁ t ht

        rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]

          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by

full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  rfl

@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  rfl

end SubgradientSetup

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
  have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
    have hG := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
    exact norm_nonneg _
  -- Key lemma: norm expansion for one step
  have h_norm_expand : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
    rw [h_step]
    have : ‖(setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [← sub_sub]
    rw [this]
    rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
    simp [inner_smul_right, smul_smul, mul_assoc, mul_comm (setup.η t), mul_left_comm (setup.η t)]
    ring_nf
    <;> simp [inner_comm]
    <;> ring_nf
  -- Subgradient inequality gives lower bound on inner product
  have h_subgrad_ineq : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥
      f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := hsubgrad (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h₂ : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := h₁
    have h₃ : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ =
        -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
      rw [inner_sub_right, inner_self_sub]
      ring
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    linarith
  -- Bounded gradient squared
  have h_grad_sq_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := hbounded (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ G := by
      have h₄ := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
      exact norm_nonneg _
    nlinarith
  -- Combine norm expansion with subgradient inequality
  have h_combined : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h₁ := h_norm_expand t ω
    have h₂ := h_subgrad_ineq t ω
    have h₃ := h_grad_sq_bound t ω
    have h₄ : 0 < setup.η t := by
      rw [hη_const t]
      exact hη_pos
    have h₅ : -2 * setup.η t * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≤
        -2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) := by
      have h₆ : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := h₂
      have h₇ : 0 < 2 * setup.η t := by positivity
      nlinarith
    have h₆ : (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h₇ : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := h₃
      have h₈ : 0 ≤ (setup.η t) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
      nlinarith
    nlinarith
  -- Integrate the combined inequality
  have h_integrated : ∀ (t : ℕ),
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
      (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    intro t
    have h₁ : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := h_combined t
    have h₂ : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono_on_univ
      · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      · intro ω
        exact h₁ ω
    have h₃ : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h₄ : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) +
          (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
          ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P +
          ∫ ω, ((setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_add
        · apply integral_add
          · exact h_int_norm_sq t
          · apply Integrable.const_mul
            apply Integrable.sub
            · exact h_int_f t
            · exact integrable_const _
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      rw [h₄]
      have h₅ : ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P =
          -2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        have h₆ : ∫ ω, (-2 * setup.η t * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P =
            -2 * setup.η t * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_const_mul
          apply Integrable.sub
          · exact h_int_f t
          · exact integrable_const _
        rw [h₆]
        have h₇ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
          have h₈ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P =
              ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, f wStar ∂setup.P := by
            apply integral_sub
            · exact h_int_f t
            · exact integrable_const _
          rw [h₈]
          have h₉ : ∫ ω, f wStar ∂setup.P = f wStar := by
            rw [integral_const]
            simp [setup.hP]
          rw [h₉]
        rw [h₇]
      rw [h₅]
      have h₆ : ∫ ω, ((setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P = (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        rw [integral_const]
        simp [setup.hP]
      rw [h₆]
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    exact h₂
  -- Sum over t from 0 to T-1
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    have h₁ : ∀ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      intro t ht
      have h₂ := h_integrated t
      have h₃ : 0 < setup.η t := by
        rw [hη_const t]
        exact hη_pos
      linarith
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P -
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro t ht
        exact h₁ t ht
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P -
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (setup.η t) ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        have h₂ : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P -
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          -- Telescoping sum
          have h₃ : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂

      (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
      (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)

      (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
      (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>

          <;> simp [setup.hP]
          <;> ring_nf
      _ = -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
          rw [Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      _ = -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + T * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          <;> ring_nf

  have h_main_ineq : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
      -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + T * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
    linarith [h_integral_bound, h_integral_linear]

  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    apply integral_nonneg
    intro ω _
    exact sq_nonneg _

  have h_w0 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    have h1 : setup.process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := SubgradientSetup.process_zero setup
    have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar
full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  rfl

  @[simp]
  theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
    rfl

  end SubgradientSetup

  theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
      (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
      (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
      (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
      (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
      (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
      (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
      (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
      (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
          ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
      (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
          (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
    have h_step_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω = setup.process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      rw [h1, hη t]
      have h2 : ‖setup.process setup t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [sub_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]
        congr 1
        rw [sub_eq_add_neg]
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2
            = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
              simp [smul_inner, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [inner_comm]
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process setup t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process setup t ω⟫ := by
        apply hsubgrad
      have h5 : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process setup t ω⟫ = -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        rw [sub_eq_add_neg, inner_add_left, inner_neg_right, neg_neg]
        <;> simp [sub_eq_add_neg]
        <;> ring_nf
      have h6 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process setup t ω) - ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        linarith
      have h7 : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar := by
        linarith
      have h8 : -2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) := by
        have h9 : 0 < η := hη_pos
        have h10 : -2 * η ≤ 0 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      have h9 : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        have h10 : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded _ _
        have h11 : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
        have h12 : 0 ≤ G := by
          have h13 := hbounded (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
          linarith [norm_nonneg _]
        nlinarith
      nlinarith

    have h_sum_bound : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := h_step_bound t
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on (univ : Set Ω) setup.hP
        · intro ω _; exact h1 ω
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
        · have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) setup.P := by
            apply Integrable.add
            · apply Integrable.sub h_int_norm_sq t
              apply Integrable.mul_const
              apply Integrable.sub h_int_f t
              exact integrable_const _
            · exact integrable_const _
          exact h3
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_add]
        · rw [integral_add]
          · exact h_int_norm_sq t
          · have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => -2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) setup.P := by
              apply Integrable.add
              · apply Integrable.mul_const
                apply Integrable.sub h_int_f t
                exact integrable_const _
              · exact integrable_const _
            exact h4
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      rw [h3] at h2
      linarith

    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            congr 1
            apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
            · intro t ht; simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp only [Finset.mem_range] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp only [Finset.mem_range] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            simp [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ']
            <;> ring_nf

    have h_integral_bound : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      linarith [h_sum_bound, h_telescope]

    have h_integral_linear : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + T * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) ∂setup.P
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, -2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro t ht
            rw [integral_add]
            · have h1 : Integrable (fun ω => -2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar)) setup.P := by
                apply Integrable.mul_const
                apply Integrable.sub h_int_f t
                exact integrable_const _
              exact h1
            · exact integrable_const _
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (-2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro t ht
            rw [integral_mul_const, integral_const setup.hP]
            <;> simp [setup.hP]
            <;> ring_nf
        _ = -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
            rw [Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        _ = -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + T * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
            simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
            <;> ring_nf

    have h_main_ineq : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + T * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      linarith [h_integral_bound, h_integral_linear]

    have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      intro ω _
      exact sq_nonneg _

    have h_w0 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : setup.process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := SubgradientSetup.process_zero setup
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar

proof_code:
have h_pointwise_ineq : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_sub : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫_ℝ :=
        hsubgrad (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
      have h_inner : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ ≥
          f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫_ℝ =
            -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
          rw [inner_sub_right, inner_self_eq_norm_sq, sub_eq_add_neg, inner_add_right, inner_neg_right]
          ring
        linarith
      have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        simp [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      have h_eta : setup.η t = η := hη t
      rw [h_step, h_eta] at *
      have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
              ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [sub_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]
            congr 1
            rw [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ +
              ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ +
              η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            ring
      have : ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h_step, h_eta]
        exact h_norm_exp
      have h_main : 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        linarith
      exact h_main

    have h_int_ineq : ∀ t, 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : (∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
            η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on_univ setup.hP
        intro ω
        exact h_pointwise_ineq t ω
      have h2 : (∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) =
          2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        rw [integral_sub (h_int_f t) (integrable_const _), integral_const_mul, setup.hP.integral_const]
        ring
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
            η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_add (h_int_norm_sq t) (integral_sub (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)) (h_int_sq t)),
            integral_sub (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)),
            integral_const_mul, setup.hP.integral_const]
        ring
      linarith

    have h_sum_ineq : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_int_ineq t

    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      induction T with
      | zero => simp
      | succ T ih =>
        rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
        ring

    have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      intro ω
      exact sq_nonneg _

    have h_init : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      have : setup.process 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
        ext ω
        simp [SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
      rw [this]
      simp [setup.hP]

    have h_bound_grad : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
        (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h_bound_each : ∀ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        intro t ht
        have hG : ∀ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
          intro ω
          have : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded _ _
          exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (norm_nonneg _) this 2
        have : ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_mono_on_univ setup.hP
          intro ω
          exact hG ω
        have : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by
          simp [setup.hP]
        calc
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by gcongr
          _ = η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by rw [this]
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t ht
          exact h_bound_each t ht
        _ = (T : ℝ) * (η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        _ = (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by ring

    calc
      (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) =
          (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) := by
        field_simp [hη_pos.ne', hT.ne']
        ring
      _ ≤ (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        gcongr
        exact h_sum_ineq
      _ = (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * ((∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      _ = (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        rw [h_telescope]
      _ ≤ (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        gcongr
        exact sub_le_self _ h_nonneg
      _ = (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        rw [h_init]
      _ ≤ (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by
        gcongr
        exact h_bound_grad
      _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ)) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
        field_simp [hη_pos.ne', hT.ne']
