theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let w : ℕ → Ω → E := setup.process
  let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
  have h_subgrad_ineq : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω), f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
    intro t ω
    have := hsubgrad (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    simp only [g] at this ⊢
    linarith [inner_self_nonneg (w t ω - wStar)]
  have h_norm_expansion : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h1 : f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := h_subgrad_ineq t ω
    have h2 : w (t + 1) ω = w t ω - η • g t ω := by
      simp [w, g, SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
      <;> ring_nf
    have h3 : ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [h2]
      calc ‖(w t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2
          = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            <;> ring_nf
    have h4 : 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
      nlinarith [hη_pos]
    nlinarith [h3, h4]
  have h_integrated : ∀ (t : ℕ),
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    intro t
    have h1 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_norm_expansion t
    have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar)) setup.P := by
      apply Integrable.const_mul
      apply Integrable.sub (h_int_f t)
      exact integrable_const (f wStar)
    have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := by
      apply Integrable.add
      · apply Integrable.sub (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))
      · apply Integrable.const_mul
        exact h_int_sq t
    have h4 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono_on_univ
      · exact h2
      · exact h3
      · intro ω _
        exact h1 ω
    calc 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
        = ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
          simp [integral_sub, h_int_f t, integrable_const (f wStar), mul_sub, sub_mul]
          <;> field_simp [hη_pos.ne']
          <;> ring_nf
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := h4
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
            η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          simp [integral_add, integral_sub, h_int_norm_sq t, h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), h_int_sq t]
          <;> ring_nf
  have h_summed : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
      η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    calc 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
        = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
          simp [Finset.mul_sum]
        _ ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
            (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t _
          exact h_integrated t
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
            (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
            η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          have h_tel : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
              (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
              (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
            induction' T with T ih
            · simp
            · simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, add_sub_cancel]
          rw [h_tel]
          rw [Finset.mul_sum]
          <;> ring_nf
  have h_bounded_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
    have h1 : ∀ t, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t
      have h2 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        have h3 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by
          simp [g]
          exact hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (norm_nonneg _) h3 2
      have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
      have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => (G : ℝ) ^ 2) setup.P := integrable_const _
      calc (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ ∫ ω, (G : ℝ) ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_mono_on_univ h4 h5
          intro ω _
          exact h2 ω
        _ = (G : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
          simp [setup.hP.integral_const]
    calc ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (G : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t _
          exact h1 t

          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          <;> ring_nf

      simp [w, SubgradientSetup.process_zero]

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let w : ℕ → Ω → E := setup.process
    let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_subgrad_ineq : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω), f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
      intro t ω
      have := hsubgrad (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
      simp only [g] at this ⊢
      linarith [inner_self_nonneg (w t ω - wStar)]
    have h_norm_expansion : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := h_subgrad_ineq t ω
      have h2 : w (t + 1) ω = w t ω - η • g t ω := by
        simp [w, g, SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        <;> ring_nf
      have h3 : ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h2]
        calc ‖(w t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2
            = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
            _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
              <;> ring_nf
      have h4 : 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
        nlinarith [hη_pos]
      nlinarith [h3, h4]
    have h_integrated : ∀ (t : ℕ),
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
          (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_norm_expansion t
      have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar)) setup.P := by
        apply Integrable.const_mul
        apply Integrable.sub (h_int_f t)
        exact integrable_const (f wStar)
      have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := by
        apply Integrable.add
        · apply Integrable.sub (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))
        · apply Integrable.const_mul
          exact h_int_sq t
      have h4 : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on_univ
        · exact h2
        · exact h3
        · intro ω _
          exact h1 ω
      calc 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          = ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
            simp [integral_sub, h_int_f t, integrable_const (f wStar), mul_sub, sub_mul]
            <;> field_simp [hη_pos.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
          _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := h4
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
              η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            simp [integral_add, integral_sub, h_int_norm_sq t, h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), h_int_sq t]
            <;> ring_nf
    have h_summed : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      calc 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
            simp [Finset.mul_sum]
          _ ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
              (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            exact h_integrated t
          _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
              (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
              ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
              η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            have h_tel : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
                (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
                (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
              rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
              induction' T with T ih
              · simp
              · simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, add_sub_cancel]
            rw [h_tel]
            rw [Finset.mul_sum]
            <;> ring_nf
    have h_bounded_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : ∀ t, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro t
        have h2 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
          intro ω
          have h3 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by
            simp [g]
            exact hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
          exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (norm_nonneg _) h3 2
        have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
        have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => (G : ℝ) ^ 2) setup.P := integrable_const _
        calc (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ ∫ ω, (G : ℝ) ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            apply integral_mono_on_univ h4 h5
            intro ω _
            exact h2 ω
          _ = (G : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
            simp [setup.hP.integral_const]
      calc ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (G : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            exact h1 t
          _ = (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
            simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
            <;> ring_nf
    have h_main : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
        simp [w, SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
        rw [setup.hP.integral_const]
      have h2 : (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≥ 0 := by
        apply integral_nonneg
        intro ω _
        exact sq_nonneg _
      have h3 : η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
          η ^ 2 * ((T : ℝ) * G ^ 2) := by
        gcongr
        exact h_bounded_sum
      calc 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
          (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := h_summed
        _ ≤ (∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
            η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          linarith [h2]
        _ ≤ ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ((T : ℝ) * G ^ 2) := by
          gcongr
          <;> try simp_all
        _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by ring
    have h_final : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
      have h1 : 0 < (T : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hT
      have h2 : 0 < 2 * η * (T : ℝ) := by positivity
      calc (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          = (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) := by
            field_simp [hη_pos.ne', h1.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
          _ ≤ (1 / (2 * η * (T : ℝ))) * (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (T : ℝ) * η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) := by
            gcongr
            exact h_main
          _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
            field_simp [hη_pos.ne', h1.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [hη_pos.ne', h1.ne']
            <;> ring_nf
    exact h_final

proof_code:
have hη_nonneg : 0 ≤ η := le_of_lt hη_pos
    let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)

    have h_key : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • g t ω := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        simp
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : ‖setup.process t ω - η • g t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = 
          ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [sub_sub]
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 = 
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2
            = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
            _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              simp [smul_inner, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg hη_nonneg]
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
        apply hsubgrad
      have h5 : ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ = -⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        rw [inner_sub_left]
        simp [inner_comm]
        ring
      have h6 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by linarith
      have h7 : ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by linarith
      have h8 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) := by
        nlinarith
      nlinarith

    have h_int_key : ∀ t,
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        intro ω; exact h_key t ω
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on
        · exact setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure
        · intro ω; exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_add, integral_sub, integral_smul, integral_smul]
        <;> simp [h_int_f, h_int_norm_sq, h_int_sq]
        <;> apply Integrable.const_mul
        <;> apply Integrable.sub
        <;> apply Integrable.add
        <;> simp_all
      rw [h3] at h2
      have h4 : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
        rw [integral_sub, integral_const]
        <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
        <;> apply h_int_f
      rw [h4] at h2
      exact h2

    have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _; exact h_int_key t
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_mul]

    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
            <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_Ico, Finset.mem_range]
            <;> omega
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]
          <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by ring

    have h_combined : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      linarith [h_sum, h_telescope]

    have h_simplified : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      have h1 : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_nonneg
        intro ω; exact sq_nonneg _
      linarith [h_combined, h1]

    have h_initial : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : setup.process 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by apply SubgradientSetup.process_zero
      rw [h1]
      simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]

    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by apply hbounded
      have h2 : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
      have h3 : 0 ≤ G := by
        have h4 : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded _ _
        have h5 : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
        linarith
      nlinarith

    have h_grad_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            apply integral_mono_on
            · exact setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure
            · intro ω; exact h_grad_bound t ω
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro t _
            rw [integral_const]
            <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
        _ = (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring

    have h_final : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            exact h_simplified
        _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by rw [h_initial]
        _ ≤ ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ((T : ℝ) * G ^ 2) := by gcongr; exact h_grad_sum
        _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by ring

    have h_divide : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀

          = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by

    have h7 : ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by linarith
    have h8 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) := by

      intro ω; exact h_key t ω

      apply integral_mono_on

      · intro ω; exact h1 ω
    have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [integral_add, integral_sub, integral_smul, integral_smul]
      <;> simp [h_int_f, h_int_norm_sq, h_int_sq]
      <;> apply Integrable.const_mul
      <;> apply Integrable.sub
      <;> apply Integrable.add
      <;> simp_all
    rw [h3] at h2
    have h4 : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
      rw [integral_sub, integral_const]
      <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
      <;> apply h_int_f
    rw [h4] at h2
    exact h2
  
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
        ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t _; exact h_int_key t
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_mul]
  
  have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
      (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
        = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
          <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_Ico, Finset.mem_range]
          <;> omega
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]
        <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by ring
  
  have h_combined : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    linarith [h_sum, h_telescope]
  
  have h_simplified : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    have h1 : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      intro ω; exact sq_nonneg _
    linarith [h_combined, h1]
  
  have h_initial : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    have h1 : setup.process 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by apply SubgradientSetup.process_zero
    rw [h1]
    simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
  
  have h_grad_bound : ∀ t ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h1 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by apply hbounded
    have h2 : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
    have h3 : 0 ≤ G := by
      have h4 : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded _ _
      have h5 : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
      linarith
    nlinarith
  
  have h_grad_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
        ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t _
          apply integral_mono_on
          · exact setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure
          · intro ω; exact h_grad_bound t ω
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro t _
          rw [integral_const]
          <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
      _ = (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
        simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
        <;> field_simp
        <;> ring
  
  have h_final : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
    calc
      2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
        ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          exact h_simplified
      _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by rw [h_initial]
      _ ≤ ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ((T : ℝ) * G ^ 2) := by gcongr; exact h_grad_sum
      _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by ring
  
  have h_divide : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_nonneg : 0 ≤ η := le_of_lt hη_pos
    let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)

    have h_key : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • g t ω := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        simp
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : ‖setup.process t ω - η • g t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = 
          ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [sub_sub]
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 = 
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2
            = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
            _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
              simp [smul_inner, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg hη_nonneg]
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
        apply hsubgrad
      have h5 : ⟪g t ω, wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ = -⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        rw [inner_sub_left]
        simp [inner_comm]
        ring
      have h6 : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by linarith
      have h7 : ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by linarith
      have h8 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) := by
        nlinarith
      nlinarith

    have h_int_key : ∀ t,
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        intro ω; exact h_key t ω
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on
        · exact setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure
        · intro ω; exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_add, integral_sub, integral_smul, integral_smul]
        <;> simp [h_int_f, h_int_norm_sq, h_int_sq]
        <;> apply Integrable.const_mul
        <;> apply Integrable.sub
        <;> apply Integrable.add
        <;> simp_all
      rw [h3] at h2
      have h4 : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
        rw [integral_sub, integral_const]
        <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
        <;> apply h_int_f
      rw [h4] at h2
      exact h2

    have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _; exact h_int_key t
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_mul]

    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
            <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_Ico, Finset.mem_range]
            <;> omega
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]
          <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by ring

    have h_combined : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      linarith [h_sum, h_telescope]

    have h_simplified : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      have h1 : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_nonneg
        intro ω; exact sq_nonneg _
      linarith [h_combined, h1]

    have h_initial : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : setup.process 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by apply SubgradientSetup.process_zero
      rw [h1]
      simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]

    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := by apply hbounded
      have h2 : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
      have h3 : 0 ≤ G := by
        have h4 : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded _ _
        have h5 : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
        linarith
      nlinarith

    have h_grad_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            apply integral_mono_on
            · exact setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure
            · intro ω; exact h_grad_bound t ω
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro t _
            rw [integral_const]
            <;> simp [setup.hP.isProbabilityMeasure]
        _ = (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring

    have h_final : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            exact h_simplified
        _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by rw [h_initial]
        _ ≤ ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ((T : ℝ) * G ^ 2) := by gcongr; exact h_grad_sum
        _ = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T : ℝ) * G ^ 2 := by ring

    have h_divide : (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀
